meaning: dibromochloropropane 二溴氯丙烷(农药名)
examples: Apache Commons DBCP and Commons pool packages — you need the JARs from these packages to go with your ORM example.
The DBCP worked over many years to design a drifting buoy to suit the needs of Oceanographers and Meteorologists.
The DBCP was formed in 1985, as a joint body of the World Meteorological Organization (WMO) and Intergovernmental Oceanographic Commission (IOC) of UNESCO.
The DBCP was the first Global Ocean Observing System (GOOS) component to achieve its initial goal, when in 2005, it deployed its 1250th drifter near Halifax Harbor, Nova Scotia.
